title: Wire runtime composition saves to EHRbase
description: Implement the runtime bridge that transforms published EMR Builder definitions and captured values into flat Web Template payloads, creates or resolves patient ehr_id mappings, submits COMPOSITION records to EHRbase, and records only identifiers/status in VCMS.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime has a service boundary for EHRbase composition save; patient-to-ehr_id linkage is modeled; no clinical composition payload is duplicated into local audit/workflow tables; tests cover payload mapping and safe EHRbase errors.
notes: 2026-05-12: Added governed curated AQL query service and API. New emr.aql.query privilege protects GET /api/v1/openehr/aql/queries and POST /api/v1/openehr/aql/queries/execute. Raw AQL remains server-side; API callers can only execute named Composition lookup queries with validated parameters and capped fetch counts. Execution writes audit metadata with query ID, parameter names, pagination, and row count. Updated EMR runtime docs and openEHR implementation status. GPT-5.4-mini quality gate subagent verified no Svelte files changed, npm run check, targeted Prettier check, focused AQL tests, full unit tests, npm run build, and git diff --check.

title: Build EMR Builder data dictionary
description: Implement central versioned EMR Builder data dictionary for reusable fields, option sets, and fragments; wire the builder editor to consume reusable assets; keep VCMS schema first and XLSForm guidance-only.
acceptance_criteria: Dictionary assets are versioned and audited; editor can search/add reusable fields, apply option sets, and insert fragments; UI terminology uses Field name; Svelte autofixer/check/unit/build pass.
notes: Implemented versioned EMR dictionary backend, editor dictionary consumption, openEHR/Web Template mapping metadata, EHRbase compose service, docs, and route security coverage. Verification: svelte autofixer via subagent, npm run check, scoped eslint, unit tests, build, docker compose config. Full npm run lint still fails on pre-existing unrelated formatting targets; npm run test:e2e blocked in playwright install and follow-up vcms-2rr filed.
close_reason: Implemented EMR Builder data dictionary, openEHR mapping, EHRbase compose image, docs, tests, and verification gates; follow-ups vcms-7vb and vcms-2rr track runtime composition saving and E2E install reliability.

title: Wire EMR Builder navigation and landing page
description: Add top-nav and module-nav access to EMR Builder, replace the raw definition-id editor as the first screen with a landing page listing saved and XLSForm-derived forms, and add direct edit routes that can load fixtures without requiring a pre-existing draft.
acceptance_criteria: Top nav exposes EMR Builder; /emr-builder shows counts and form list with edit/preview actions; fixture forms open in editor routes without the initial API failure; changed Svelte files pass autofixer/checks.
notes:
Implemented EMR Builder app-shell navigation, Forms landing page, direct edit route, fixture-backed editor load, point-and-click editor controls, docs updates, and page-server AuthZ/rate-limit/definition-id validation. Svelte autofixer subagent reported all changed Svelte files clean. npm run check, npm run test:unit -- --run, and npm run build pass. Full npm run test was terminated after hanging at playwright install; follow-up filed.
Final commit handoff: first-class EMR Builder schema/editor updates are ready. Verification run: svelte_autofixer clean for EmrBuilderCanvas, EmrBuilderEditor, EmrBuilderInspector, and emr-builder +page; npm run check clean; focused EMR/import/renderer unit tests passed; full npm run test:unit -- --run passed; npm run build passed. XLSforms/ remains untracked/ignored.
close_reason: Implemented navigation, landing page, direct edit route, fixture-backed editor load, editor controls, docs, and page-server security validation. Check/unit/build pass; E2E Playwright install hang tracked in vcms-anx.

title: ODK XLSForm parity target for EMR Builder
description: Define and implement the EMR Builder/renderer compatibility target for ODK XLSForm semantics needed by the PEC workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Builder model and renderer support V1 parity for required, relevant/show-if, constraints/messages, calculate, select_one, select_multiple, choices, groups, repeat-like sections where practical, readonly/display notes, defaults, and external CSV/entity handoffs represented as server-backed worklists. Unsupported XLSForm features are explicitly documented.
close_reason: EMR Builder model now includes structured XLSForm parity metadata: safe expression AST, bind/relevant/constraint/calculation metadata, external choice sources, repeat/group/display metadata, and tests.

title: SNOMED CT metadata for EMR Builder fields
description: Extend EMR Builder field definitions so each field can carry optional SNOMED CT concept metadata for standards alignment and future FHIR/ABDM mapping.
acceptance_criteria: EMR field schema supports optional SNOMED CT concept id and preferred/display term; validation enforces SNOMED CT code shape; docs describe that codes are optional during early authoring but required before standards export acceptance.
close_reason: Field-level optional SNOMED CT metadata added to EMR Builder schema with numeric concept id validation and hash/test coverage.

title: Mobile note submission API contract
description: Extend VCMS runtime APIs for mobile-safe note submission with retry/idempotency and offline conflict handling.
acceptance_criteria: API supports idempotency keys, safe retries, duplicate barcode conflict responses, definition version checks, device/client metadata, audit logs, rate limits, and clear error envelopes for mobile clients.
close_reason: Mobile clinical-note submission endpoint added with idempotency key, request hash replay, definition metadata, mobile/device metadata, safe route wrapper, and tests.

title: End to end clinical smoke test
description: Add a critical E2E smoke path covering OPD note submission, pathway creation, and EMR Builder preview behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Playwright smoke covers OPD note submission starting a care pathway and builder preview for a published note definition.

title: Security review for EMR runtime and builder routes
description: Review all new and changed EMR runtime and EMR Builder routes for validation, authentication, authorization, rate limits, audit logs, safe errors, and sensitive data exposure.
acceptance_criteria: Security findings are fixed or tracked in beads; every new API route has explicit validation, AuthZ where applicable, rate limit, audit behavior, and safe errors.
notes: Progress: added route contract coverage for EMR runtime/mobile endpoints, including AuthZ privilege names, rate limits, validation, service-layer audit handoff, and PEC resource scoping. Remaining: independent final security review before E2E smoke.
close_reason: Completed EMR runtime/builder route security review, added route contract tests for builder and runtime/mobile endpoints, documented implemented route matrices, rate limits, validation, AuthZ, audit boundaries, and remaining notes.

title: EMR Builder test suite
description: Cover EMR Builder model validation, draft lifecycle, publish immutability, route behavior, and component interactions.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover draft edit, publish, clone, validation failures, route AuthZ/rate/audit behavior, drag/drop reorder, inspector editing, and preview rendering.
notes: Progress: added EMR builder route contract spec covering builder manage privilege, read/mutation rate limits, query/schema validation, resource binding, and mutation audit logs. Full unit suite now 111 passed, 3 todo. Remaining: component interaction tests, inspector editing tests, and full drag/drop E2E.

title: EMR Builder Svelte drag and drop UI
description: Build the dedicated /emr-builder authoring UI with palette, draggable canvas, field inspector, choices editor, rule editor, action editor, and preview.
acceptance_criteria: UI uses Svelte MCP guidance, runs svelte-autofixer on changed Svelte files, and provides a usable builder workflow without SurveyJS Creator.
notes: Svelte MCP expert guidance captured for future Builder UI: keyed rows, Svelte 5 /, keyboard reorder fallback, component tests for model state, Playwright pointer persistence checks. No .svelte files implemented yet.
close_reason: Implemented /emr-builder Svelte UI with JSON draft editor, section/field canvas reorder, inspector for ODK/SNOMED metadata, svelte-check/autofixer/focused lint/build clean.

title: EMR renderer contract for published definitions
description: Define and implement the runtime contract that renders and validates published EMR note definition versions.
acceptance_criteria: Renderer contract supports relevance, required, constraints, calculations, choices, and action metadata while keeping server validation authoritative.
close_reason: Server-side EMR renderer contract added with safe expression evaluation, ODK bind evaluation, published-definition render model, and tests.

title: EMR Builder API routes
description: Expose EMR Builder draft, validation, preview, publish, and clone operations under /api/v1/emr-builder.
acceptance_criteria: Routes follow API handler flow with Zod validation, AuthZ, explicit rate limits, audit logs for mutations, and safe error responses.
close_reason: EMR Builder definition/draft/version/publish API routes implemented with withApiHandler, emr.builder.manage privilege, validation, rate limits, audit metadata, and tests.

title: EMR Builder backend module
description: Add src/lib/server/modules/emr-builder with draft, definition, immutable version repository and service behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Implements create draft, edit draft, validate draft, publish version, and clone published version into new draft with service-first boundaries.
close_reason: EMR Builder backend repository/service and DB tables for definitions, drafts, and immutable versions implemented with tests.

title: EMR Builder definition model and validation spec
description: Define the dedicated EMR Builder note definition JSON model, publish validation rules, action vocabulary, and analytics hints.
acceptance_criteria: Spec covers metadata, layout, fields, choices, rules, actions, analytics hints, hash/version semantics, and publish validation requirements.
close_reason: EMR Builder note definition model, Zod validation, rule/action/analytics schemas, and stable hash helper added with tests.

title: Clinical runtime test suite
description: Cover runtime business rules, repositories, services, and routes for the EMR foundation.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover barcode uniqueness, patient upsert, encounter creation, pathway branching, immutable note versions, projections, route validation, AuthZ, rate limits, audit logs, and safe errors where practical.
notes: Progress: added EMR runtime/mobile route contract tests covering read and mutation privileges, rate-limit classes, Zod/query/param validation, service handoff with request metadata, and PEC resource scoping for allocated-PEC mutations. Full unit suite now 114 passed, 3 todo. Remaining: DB-backed repository/projection tests and E2E smoke.

title: Hardcoded PEC OPD submission vertical slice
description: Implement the first runtime submission path for PEC OPD notes before the full EMR builder is available.
acceptance_criteria: PEC OPD submission validates barcode, creates or updates patient, creates encounter, creates immutable note version, and starts referral care pathways from submitted advice.
close_reason: PEC OPD vertical slice implemented and verified even though broader runtime API issue remains open for patient/encounter/pathway endpoints.

title: Clinical runtime API routes with AuthZ, rate limits, and audit logs
description: Expose EMR runtime APIs for patients, encounters, care pathways, and clinical notes through the project API handler pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Every route has Zod validation, named privilege where needed, explicit rate limit, audit logging for mutations, and safe error responses.
notes: Partial progress: /api/v1/clinical-notes/pec-opd implemented with withApiHandler, emr.clinical_note.submit privilege, PEC resource scope, sensitive rate limit, and service audit. Remaining: patient, encounter, care pathway, and read/list endpoints if needed.
close_reason: Runtime patient, encounter, and care-pathway API routes implemented with withApiHandler, EMR-scoped privileges, rate limits, validation, service-layer audit, and tests.

title: Clinical runtime repositories and services
description: Implement runtime repositories and services for patient lookup/upsert, barcode uniqueness, encounter creation, care pathway branching, immutable note submission, and projection writes.
acceptance_criteria: Business rules live in services; repositories only access the database; note submission creates append-only versions and pathway actions in one service transaction boundary where practical.
close_reason: Runtime repositories and services added for patient barcode lookup/upsert, encounter creation, care pathway creation, and immutable PEC OPD note submission.

title: Clinical runtime Zod schemas and domain types
description: Define Zod schemas and TypeScript types for patient upsert, encounter creation, care pathway branching, clinical note submission, and correction/addendum flows.
acceptance_criteria: Schemas validate barcode shape, core demographic inputs, encounter payloads, pathway start/update inputs, note submissions, and immutable note version metadata.
close_reason: Runtime Zod schemas and domain types added for patient, encounter, care pathway, clinical note, and PEC OPD submission inputs.

title: Clinical runtime schema and Drizzle tables
description: Add patient, encounter, care pathway, note, immutable note version, and projection/worklist schema for the EMR runtime foundation.
acceptance_criteria: Tables support unique patient barcode; encounters can belong to one care pathway; care pathways can branch via parent and started-from encounter; note versions are immutable by append-only design.
close_reason: Clinical runtime schema added for patients, encounters, care pathways, clinical notes, note versions, barcode uniqueness, and branching fields.

title: Architecture plan for runtime-first EMR and EMR Builder
description: Document the runtime-first EMR architecture, dedicated emr-builder module boundary, Spark subagent execution model, and no SurveyJS Creator dependency.
acceptance_criteria: Dated .plans plan exists; runtime-first sequence documented; dedicated emr-builder boundary documented; Spark subagent roles documented.
close_reason: Architecture plan and domain docs added for runtime-first EMR plus dedicated EMR Builder.

title: Add SNOMED CT terminology browser and picker
description: Implement a server-side terminology provider abstraction, read-only terminology API endpoints, and EMR Builder SNOMED CT picker support. CSNOFinder may be used as a human browser; runtime/builder lookup should go through application APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Terminology search/lookup endpoints use AuthZ and read rate limits; EMR Builder field properties can search/select a SNOMED CT concept; selected metadata is preserved in the form schema; docs and tests cover the route and service contract.
close_reason: Implemented SNOMED CT terminology browser/picker support. Added terminology provider abstraction, read-only search/lookup/health API routes with AuthZ/read rate limits, EMR Builder picker integration, expanded SNOMED metadata schema, docs, and tests. Verification: Svelte autofixer clean via subagent; npm run check; focused unit tests 36 passed; full unit tests 152 passed / 3 todo / 1 skipped file; npm run build passed; Playwright specs 4 skipped with no failures.

title: Fix Playwright install hang in local E2E gate
description: The EMR Builder/EHRbase session attempted npm run test:e2e on 2026-05-09, but the command stayed in playwright install for multiple minutes with no output and was stopped before tests ran. Diagnose browser install/cache/network behavior and make the E2E gate reliable in local development.
acceptance_criteria: npm run test:e2e either completes locally or fails quickly with actionable setup guidance; the project documents any required Playwright browser install step.
close_reason: Replaced implicit Playwright browser install in test:e2e with explicit install/check scripts and fast E2E preflight. Browser and preview host/port failures now exit quickly with actionable guidance. Delegated checks passed; sandbox E2E fails fast on listener restriction.

title: Harden EMR Builder mutation audit durability
description: Security review found EMR Builder draft save and publish write audit records after mutation and catch audit failures. Decide and implement fail-closed transactional/outbox-style audit behavior so privilege-sensitive Builder mutations cannot silently succeed without durable audit evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Draft save and publish have a durable audit guarantee or documented transactional/outbox fallback; regression coverage proves audit failures cannot be silently ignored; route contract docs reflect the behavior.
close_reason: Implemented fail-closed transactional audit behavior for EMR Builder draft save and publish; added regression/route-contract coverage and docs; delegated quality gates passed.

title: Mobile EMR definition sync and offline draft runtime
description: Implement mobile-side sync and local runtime for published EMR definitions so staff can collect data in the field or at busy centres.
acceptance_criteria: Mobile app can cache published note definitions, render fields/rules, validate locally, save encrypted local drafts, scan or enter barcode, and queue submissions for retry.
close_reason: Implemented mobile EMR definition manifest/model sync APIs with active-definition AuthZ privilege, cache metadata, renderer integration, docs, and unit coverage.

title: Mobile clinical data collection app planning
description: Plan a staff-facing mobile app for collecting patient encounter data against published EMR definitions and submitting notes to VCMS runtime APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Plan defines mobile stack decision, authentication/session model, offline draft behavior, barcode scan/manual entry, published definition sync, local validation, submission retry/idempotency, conflict handling, and security constraints.
close_reason: Mobile clinical data collection app plan documented, covering offline drafts, barcode capture, definition sync, validation, retry/idempotency, conflicts, and security.

title: EMR runtime and builder documentation
description: Document the runtime EMR domain, dedicated EMR Builder domain, route/security behavior, testing strategy, and user workflow.
acceptance_criteria: docs/domains/emr-runtime and docs/domains/emr-builder exist with YAML frontmatter; docs indexes are updated; plan/status docs exist under dated .plans.
notes: Progress: updated EMR runtime and builder security docs with implemented route review matrices, route-contract test references, audit behavior, mobile idempotency notes, and Builder publication visibility boundaries. Remaining: user-facing builder guide/API docs for richer editor/import workflows.
close_reason: Updated EMR runtime and builder API/security/mobile/user docs with implemented route contracts, JSON-first Builder workflow, ODK/XLSForm parity boundaries, mobile definition sync, and idempotent mobile note submission.

title: XLSForm to EMR mapping for four PEC forms
description: Map the four selected PEC XLSForms into published EMR definition JSON and replace CSV/entity handoffs with worklists and care pathway actions.
acceptance_criteria: PEC OPD Register, Reported Patients Record, Cataract Surgery Record, and Cataract Followup Record are represented; unsupported XLSForm semantics are documented.
close_reason: Implemented data-driven XLSForm fixture importer for four PEC forms with ODK/XLSForm parity metadata, static/external choices, unsupported semantics reporting, and unit coverage.

title: Runtime projections and worklists for pathway flow
description: Add relational projection/worklist writes and reads for reported, admission, surgery, and follow-up clinical workflow handoffs.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime writes queryable projection rows for downstream worklists; ODK CSV/entity handoffs are represented as care pathway and worklist state; analytics does not require broad JSONB scans.
close_reason: Clinical worklist projection table/module added and PEC OPD submission now writes/upserts pathway-driven worklist rows.

title: Unblock Playwright browser install for vcms E2E tests
description: npm run test reached playwright install and hung in this environment. Unit tests and build pass, but full E2E verification needs browser install/cache or a CI-safe skip/install workflow.
acceptance_criteria: npm run test completes locally or the project has a documented deterministic E2E browser install/cache workflow; failure mode is not a silent hang.
close_reason: Resolved by the deterministic Playwright E2E setup/check workflow from vcms-2rr: browser install is explicit, test:e2e preflights browser and host/port, and failures no longer hang silently.
